name: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana
description: World's largest health insurance scheme providing ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization. Covers over 1,900 medical procedures including surgeries, medical treatments, and diagnostics.

eligibility.incomeLimit: BPL and deprived categories as per SECC 2011

benefits: Pre and post hospitalization expenses covered
All pre-existing diseases covered from day one
applicationProcess: Visit nearest Ayushman Bharat Arogya Mitra at empanelled hospital or CSC center. Verify eligibility at mera.pmjay.gov.in

name: Dr. YSR Aarogyasri Health Care Trust
description: Telangana's flagship health scheme providing financial protection to BPL families for treatment of serious ailments requiring hospitalization and surgery. Covers 2,407 procedures across 1,171 conditions.
benefits: Up to ₹5,00,000 per family per year
applicationProcess: Apply at nearest PHC/CHC or Aarogyasri counter at empanelled hospital. Carry white ration card for eligibility verification.

name: NTR Vaidya Seva
description: Andhra Pradesh government health scheme providing cashless treatment to BPL families. Covers a wide range of medical and surgical procedures at network hospitals across the state.
benefits: Up to ₹5,00,000 per family per year
applicationProcess: Visit nearest NTR Vaidya Seva counter at government or empanelled hospital. Apply with white ration card.

name: Janani Suraksha Yojana
description: A safe motherhood intervention promoting institutional delivery among pregnant women. Provides cash assistance to pregnant women delivering in government or accredited health facilities.

eligibility.incomeLimit: BPL families prioritized, all eligible in LPS states

applicationProcess: Register at nearest PHC/Sub-center during pregnancy. ASHA worker will assist in registration and hospital admission.

name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana
description: Maternity benefit programme providing ₹5,000 in three installments to pregnant women and lactating mothers for the first living child. Supports nutrition and partial wage compensation.

eligibility.incomeLimit: All pregnant women for first child

benefits: Additional ₹1,000 at institutional delivery under JSY
applicationProcess: Register at nearest Anganwadi Center or approved health facility. Fill Form 1-A with required documents.

name: Rashtriya Bal Swasthya Karyakram
description: Child health screening and early intervention services for children 0-18 years. Covers 4Ds: Defects at birth, Diseases, Deficiencies, and Developmental delays including disabilities.
applicationProcess: Mobile health teams visit Anganwadi centers and schools. Parents can also visit nearest District Early Intervention Center (DEIC).

name: National Health Mission
description: Umbrella programme encompassing rural and urban health missions. Provides free essential healthcare services through government health facilities including PHCs, CHCs, and District Hospitals.
benefits: Free maternal and child health services
documentsRequired: No documents needed for emergency care
applicationProcess: Visit nearest government PHC, CHC, or District Hospital. No prior registration needed for most services.

name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Aushadhi Pariyojana
description: Provides quality generic medicines at affordable prices through dedicated outlets called Jan Aushadhi Kendras. Medicines are 50-90% cheaper than branded equivalents.
applicationProcess: Visit nearest Jan Aushadhi Kendra with doctor's prescription. Find nearest store at janaushadhi.gov.in

name: Mission Indradhanush
description: Immunization drive to fully immunize all children under 2 years and pregnant women. Covers vaccines for 12 diseases including measles, polio, tuberculosis, hepatitis B, and more.
benefits: Covers BCG, OPV, Pentavalent, Measles-Rubella, Rotavirus, PCV
documentsRequired: No documents needed - no child turned away
applicationProcess: Visit nearest PHC, Sub-center, or Anganwadi Center on immunization day. ASHA workers also conduct home visits.

name: Nikshay Poshan Yojana
description: Nutritional support to TB patients. Provides ₹500 per month to every notified TB patient throughout their treatment duration to support nutrition and treatment adherence.
benefits: Direct benefit transfer to bank account
applicationProcess: Automatic enrollment when registered for TB treatment at DOTS center. Healthcare provider initiates the registration.

name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana
description: Accident insurance scheme offering ₹2 lakh for accidental death and permanent disability, and ₹1 lakh for partial disability. Premium of only ₹20 per year.
benefits: Auto-debit of premium from bank account
applicationProcess: Apply at any bank branch or through internet banking. Fill consent form for auto-debit of ₹20/year.

name: Ayushman Bharat Health Infrastructure Mission
description: Strengthening healthcare infrastructure across India with focus on critical care and primary health facilities. Supports building Health & Wellness Centers, District hospitals, and labs.
benefits: Upgraded PHCs to Health & Wellness Centers
Free essential health services at HWCs
applicationProcess: Visit nearest Health & Wellness Center (upgraded PHC). Services available on walk-in basis.

name: National Mental Health Programme
description: Provides accessible and affordable mental health care across the country through District Mental Health Programme. Free counseling, psychiatry services, and medicines at district hospitals.
applicationProcess: Visit nearest District Hospital mental health clinic. Call Kiran helpline 1800-599-0019 for immediate support.

name: Pradhan Mantri National Dialysis Programme
description: Provides free dialysis services to poor patients at district hospitals through PPP model. Aims to make dialysis affordable and accessible in every district.
applicationProcess: Get referral from government hospital nephrologist. Register at nearest district hospital dialysis center.

name: Employees' State Insurance
description: Social security scheme for organized sector workers earning up to ₹21,000/month. Provides comprehensive medical care to employees and their dependents along with cash benefits.
benefits: Full medical care for employee and family
Maternity benefit (100% of wages for 26 weeks)
applicationProcess: Employer registers on ESIC portal. Employee automatically enrolled when salary is below threshold.

name: Kisan Credit Card Health Cover
description: Health insurance coverage linked to Kisan Credit Card holders. Provides accident and health insurance for farmers and their families at minimal premium.
applicationProcess: Apply at the bank where KCC is issued. Insurance is often bundled with KCC renewal.
